dj_text: You're listening to That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. Where the DJ is always ON. Literally. I never leave. From Min Ven Min Ven to Dø I Norden. The vibe shift is violent. Good. Got a nice little set going. 3 more after this one.
commercial_text: This is a test of the Emergency Radio System. If this were an actual emergency, you'd hear me screaming. It's not.
hijack_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Dø I Norden
